problem_statement: Independent consultants and small agencies lose follow-up tasks after client meetings and email threads.
target_market: Solo consultants and small agencies managing multiple client conversations each week.
offered_solution: An AI assistant that turns meeting notes and email threads into a clean action list with deadlines and follow-up suggestions.
validation_goal: Test whether the follow-up pain feels strong enough for users to try a lightweight workflow tool.
landing_page_text: Turn messy follow-up into a reviewable action list without another heavy project-management system.
mvp_scope: Upload meeting notes, extract actions, and send a human-reviewable summary.
concierge_mvp_idea: Founder manually reviews uploaded notes and returns a polished follow-up checklist within two hours.
assumptions: Users feel enough pain from dropped follow-up to try a new tool.
A lightweight AI workflow will feel easier than current manual workarounds.
A low-cost subscription is acceptable once value is visible.
constraints: No complex integrations in the first version.
Need to minimise sensitive client data exposure.
known_risks: Trust may fall if the product sounds too invasive.
Users may already feel overloaded by subscriptions.
